title: 26-circle unit-square packing evolution chain
objective: score = -sum(radii); minimizing score maximizes total radius
chain_scope: Public best-so-far chain starting at the original domain program.py baseline, followed by a seeded continuation from the previous accepted geometry. Raw prompts, raw logs, telemetry, non-retained candidates, and operational context are excluded.

domain.name: 26-circle packing in the unit square
constraints: all circles inside the unit square

steps.label: original-program
steps.note: Original domain program.py baseline evaluated before generated candidates.

steps.label: first-generated-candidate
steps.note: First valid generated candidate after the original program.py baseline.

steps.label: generation-1-improvement
steps.note: Second valid generation-1 improvement retained in the public progress CSV.

steps.label: previous-accepted
steps.note: Previous accepted public result used as the seed for the continuation run.

steps.label: continuation-improvement
steps.note: First retained continuation improvement over the previous accepted geometry.

steps.label: accepted
steps.note: Accepted continuation geometry used for the updated public result.
